message:
Fix bar chart multi-grapheme labels, tree search navigation, log viewer match tracking, and textarea line-ending cleanup

Bar chart group labels (charts.rs):
- Render the full group label (truncated to available bar group width)
  instead of only the first grapheme. Center the truncated label under
  the bar group and iterate over all graphemes with correct x-offset
  positioning and width tracking.

History panel background fill (history_panel.rs):
- Replace the manual per-cell background-only fill loop with a single
  buffer.fill() call using a fully-styled cell, applying foreground,
  background, and attributes consistently.

Log viewer search tracking (log_viewer.rs):
- Correctly adjust search.current by subtracting the count of evicted
  matches before clamping to the valid range, preventing the current
  match pointer from jumping to the wrong result when log entries are
  trimmed from the front.

Textarea line endings (textarea.rs):
- Replace 13 instances of a fragile chained strip_suffix('\n') /
  strip_suffix('\r') pattern with trim_end_matches(['\n', '\r']),
  which correctly handles all line ending variants (LF, CR, CRLF,
  bare CR) and is significantly more readable.

Tree widget filtered navigation (tree.rs):
- Replace the expensive clone-based filter_node approach in
  find_path_indices_at_visible_index with a lightweight
  FilteredPathNode structure that tracks original child indices and
  expanded state. Add walk_filtered_path to correctly map visible
  indices back to the original tree, fixing navigation errors where
  cloned child indices differed from the original tree's indices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
